content.text:
<user_query>

You are ChangeReviewer. Evaluate whether the committed toolbox changes should be pulled to the target host.

Target host: local
Host purpose: Primary control plane for day-to-day interaction and SSH orchestration

Committed changes (commit 2538f12 on main):
- commands/play-motion-rl.md: Removed --push_vel_xy, updated --interactive description for modal controls
- scripts/play_motion_rl.sh: Removed --push_vel_xy arg parsing and forwarding, updated interactive mode info

Return your decision as one of: skip, prompt, or apply. Include a brief policy/security summary and any blockers.
</user_query>
Reviewing the committed changes to evaluate policy and security.

```yaml
agent: ChangeReviewer
host: local
host_role: Primary control plane for day-to-day interaction and SSH orchestration

policy:
  compatible: yes
  decision: apply
  reason: Changes align with local control-plane usage; removal of --push_vel_xy and updated interactive docs fit the play-motion-rl workflow.
  findings:
    - severity: low
      file: commands/play-motion-rl.md
      reason: Documentation-only; --push_vel_xy removed, --interactive description updated for modal controls.
    - severity: low
      file: scripts/play_motion_rl.sh
      reason: Removes --push_vel_xy parsing/forwarding; simplifies script and reduces argument surface.

security:
  overall: pass
  blockers: []
  warnings: []

sync_decision: apply
required_changes: []
confidence: 95
```
